'''鈭歾h-d-t''' ('''zhadata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrate|quadrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrate|quadrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| zhadata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadatithi|zhadatithi]] || [[word:zhadatiji|zhadatiji]] || [[word:zhadatishi|zhadatishi]] || [[word:zhadati|zhadati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadatuthuth|zhadatuthuth]] || [[word:zhadatujuj|zhadatujuj]] || [[word:zhadatushush|zhadatushush]] || [[word:zhadat|zhadat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadatuthu|zhadatuthu]] || [[word:zhadatuju|zhadatuju]] || [[word:zhadatushu|zhadatushu]] || [[word:zhadatu|zhadatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadatufuth|zhadatufuth]] || [[word:zhadatufuj|zhadatufuj]] || [[word:zhadatufush|zhadatufush]] || [[word:zhadatuf|zhadatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadatethe|zhadatethe]] || [[word:zhadateje|zhadateje]] || [[word:zhadateshe|zhadateshe]] || [[word:zhadate|zhadate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadatothoth|zhadatothoth]] || [[word:zhadatojoj|zhadatojoj]] || [[word:zhadatoshosh|zhadatoshosh]] || [[word:zhadat|zhadat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadatotho|zhadatotho]] || [[word:zhadatojo|zhadatojo]] || [[word:zhadatosho|zhadatosho]] || [[word:zhadato|zhadato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadatofoth|zhadatofoth]] || [[word:zhadatofoj|zhadatofoj]] || [[word:zhadatofosh|zhadatofosh]] || [[word:zhadatof|zhadatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhadat忙th忙|zhadat忙th忙]] || [[word:zhadat忙j忙|zhadat忙j忙]] || [[word:zhadat忙sh忙|zhadat忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhadat忙|zhadat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadatathath|zhadatathath]] || [[word:zhadatajaj|zhadatajaj]] || [[word:zhadatashash|zhadatashash]] || [[word:zhadat|zhadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadatatha|zhadatatha]] || [[word:zhadataja|zhadataja]] || [[word:zhadatasha|zhadatasha]] || [[word:zhadata|zhadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadatafath|zhadatafath]] || [[word:zhadatafaj|zhadatafaj]] || [[word:zhadatafash|zhadatafash]] || [[word:zhadataf|zhadataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhadatasha|zhadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhadatasha|gozhadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhadatasha|gokizhadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhadatn眉sha|zhadatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhadatnkn眉sha|gozhadatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadatn眉sha|gokizhadatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhadatsh毛sha|zhadatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhadatnksh毛sha|gozhadatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhadatsh毛sha|gokizhadatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadatrosha|zhadatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadatnkrosha|gozhadatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadatrosha|gokizhadatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadatmusha|zhadatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadatnkmusha|gozhadatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadatmusha|gokizhadatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhadatsherasha|zhadatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhadatnksherasha|gozhadatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhadatsherasha|gokizhadatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhadatngasha|zhadatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhadatnkngasha|gozhadatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhadatngasha|gokizhadatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhadatyasha|zhadatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhadatnkyasha|gozhadatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhadatyasha|gokizhadatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhadatyamasha|zhadatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhadatnkyamasha|gozhadatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhadatyamasha|gokizhadatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadatn眉sh毛sha|zhadatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadatnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhadatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadatn眉sh毛sha|gokizhadatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadatn眉rosha|zhadatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadatnkn眉rosha|gozhadatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadatn眉rosha|gokizhadatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadatn眉musha|zhadatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadatnkn眉musha|gozhadatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadatn眉musha|gokizhadatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadatsh毛n眉sha|zhadatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadatnksh毛n眉sha|gozhadatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadatsh毛n眉sha|gokizhadatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadatsh毛rosha|zhadatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadatnksh毛rosha|gozhadatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadatsh毛rosha|gokizhadatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadatsh毛musha|zhadatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadatnksh毛musha|gozhadatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadatsh毛musha|gokizhadatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadatron眉sha|zhadatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadatnkron眉sha|gozhadatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadatron眉sha|gokizhadatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadatrosh毛sha|zhadatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadatnkrosh毛sha|gozhadatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadatrosh毛sha|gokizhadatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhadatromusha|zhadatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhadatnkromusha|gozhadatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhadatromusha|gokizhadatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhadatmun眉sha|zhadatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhadatnkmun眉sha|gozhadatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhadatmun眉sha|gokizhadatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhadatmush毛sha|zhadatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhadatnkmush毛sha|gozhadatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhadatmush毛sha|gokizhadatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhadatmurosha|zhadatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhadatnkmurosha|gozhadatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhadatmurosha|gokizhadatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhadat|zhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙d忙t|zh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhadat|hozhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙d忙t|hozh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhadat|hohozhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙d忙t|hohozh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhadat|n眉zhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙d忙t|n眉zh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhadat|n眉n眉zhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙d忙t|n眉n眉zh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhadat|n茂zhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙d忙t|n茂zh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhadat|n茂n茂zhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙d忙t|n茂n茂zh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhadat|luzhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙d忙t|luzh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhadat|luluzhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙d忙t|luluzh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhadat|lizhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙d忙t|lizh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhadat|lilizhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙d忙t|lilizh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhadat|kozhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙d忙t|kozh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhadat|kokozhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙d忙t|kokozh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhadat|kezhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙d忙t|kezh忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhadat|kekezhadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙d忙t|kekezh忙d忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
